title: Shimrown #8112
definition:
Shimron-meron = "watch-height of Meron"

 1) a Canaanite royal city allotted to Zebulun
    1a) probably the same as 'Shimron'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shimron-meron = "watch-height of Meron"

 1) a Canaanite royal city allotted to Zebulun
    1a) probably the same as 'Shimron'

    NASB:  a Canaanite city conquered by Joshua, the same as 8110a
